title: linum austriacum subsp. glaucescens
intro: Linum austriacum subsp. glaucescens, also known as Austrian flax, is a subspecies of the flax plant that belongs to the family Linaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Linum austriacum subsp. glaucescens include soothing irritated skin, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, creams, and ointments, which are often used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
